//: Production path — Snowflake Kafka Connector in Snowpipe Streaming mode.
//ingestion: snowflake.ingestion.method=SNOWPIPE_STREAMING streams rows directly into RAW tables with sub-second latency. Deploy onto a Kafka Connect worker: POST this to the Connect REST API /connectors.
name: insurance-snowpipe-streaming-sink

config.snowflake.url.name: xy12345.us-east-1.snowflakecomputing.com:443
config.snowflake.user.name: INSURANCE_SVC
config.snowflake.role.name: INSURANCE_ENGINEER
config.snowflake.database.name: INSURANCE_PLATFORM
config.snowflake.schema.name: RAW
config.//topic2table: Route each topic to its RAW landing table
config.errors.deadletterqueue.topic.name: insurance.dlq
